title: Jack Black (Steve) Zetterstrand Painting
description: Custom Painting based off of Zetterstrand's (the Minecraft iconic painting artist) painting of Jack Black in his signature style! Fits in perfectly with vanilla.
body:
This simple project that adds the recently showcased painting by Kristoffer Zetterstrand (the Artist responsible for all of the iconic minecraft paintings) of Jack Black as an in-game painting. A scan of the painting has been scaled and tuned to match the other vanilla ones, and implemented as a 2x2 placeable via the vanilla painting item.

![In-game Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/RROEgoOu/images/b734d8c2306842d0594bb66f480d571ad4cf8aa6.png)

Available on 1.21+ as a data+resourcepack or multiloader jar.
Please note that for vanilla clients and servers, the world needs the datapack installed and clients need the resourcepack active.
